en_options: Data Refresh Schedule and Gateway Settings (must be reset manually for Test environment)
quizzes.en_explanation: Deployment Pipeline copies the report and model, but the refresh schedules and gateway credentials must be set for the new environment.

quizzes.question: إذا تغيّر سعر منتج من 100 إلى 120، وتريد الاحتفاظ بالسعر القديم للأرقام التاريخية، أي SCD type تستخدم؟
quizzes.explanation: Type 2 يحتفظ بالتاريخ الكامل. سيكون لديك صف قديم (100) وصف جديد (120) مع تواريخ الصلاحية.
quizzes.en_question: If a product price changes from 100 to 120, and you want to keep the old price for historical figures, which SCD type do you use?
quizzes.en_explanation: Type 2 keeps the full history. You will have an old row (100) and a new row (120) with expiration dates.

quizzes.question: في علاقة Many-to-Many بين Students و Courses (طالب واحد له كورسات متعددة، كورس واحد له طلاب متعددين)، كيف يبدو Bridge Table؟
options: جدول StudentCourse يحتوي على StudentID و CourseID فقط
جدول يحتوي على كل بيانات الطالب والكورس
لا يوجد bridge ، الربط المباشر كافٍ
quizzes.explanation: Bridge Table يحتوي على المفاتيح الأجنبية فقط (StudentID, CourseID) بدون البيانات الإضافية.
quizzes.en_question: In a Many-to-Many relationship between Students and Courses (one student has multiple courses, one course has multiple students), how does the Bridge Table look?
en_options: The StudentCourse table contains only StudentID and CourseID
A table containing all student and course data
There is no bridge, direct binding is sufficient
quizzes.en_explanation: Bridge Table contains only foreign keys (StudentID, CourseID) without additional data.

quizzes.question: إذا أردت في DAX الوصول إلى عمود من جدول مرتبط بدون filter context مباشر، أي دالة تستخدم؟
quizzes.explanation: RELATED يجلب قيمة من جدول related 1-side بناءً على العلاقة. VALUES يجلب الـ unique values في سياق معين.
quizzes.en_question: If you want to access a column from a related table in DAX without direct filter context, which function do you use?
quizzes.en_explanation: RELATED fetches a value from a related 1-side table based on the relationship. VALUES fetches the unique values ​​in a given context.

quizzes.question: ما الفرق بين ALL() و REMOVEFILTERS() في DAX؟
options: كلاهما يزيل الفلاترات، لكن REMOVEFILTERS أكثر مرونة في إزالة فلاترات محددة فقط
quizzes.explanation: ALL: يزيل كل الفلاترات من جداول محددة. REMOVEFILTERS: أكثر دقة، يمكن تحديد الأعمدة بالضبط.
quizzes.en_question: What is the difference between ALL() and REMOVEFILTERS() in DAX?
en_options: Both remove filters, but REMOVEFILTERS is more flexible in removing only specific filters
quizzes.en_explanation: ALL: Removes all filters from specific tables. REMOVEFILTERS: More precisely, columns can be selected exactly.

quizzes.question: لحساب عدد كلمات في نص (مثل Product Description)، أي دالة نصية ستستخدم؟
options: LEN() لـ length ، ثم عد المسافات وأضف 1
quizzes.explanation: لحساب الكلمات: LEN(text) - LEN(SUBSTITUTE(text," ","")) + 1 (العدد = المسافات + 1).
quizzes.en_question: To count words in text (like Product Description), which text function will you use?
en_options: LEN() for length , then count the spaces and add 1
quizzes.en_explanation: To count words: LEN(text) - LEN(SUBSTITUTE(text," ","")) + 1 (number = spaces + 1).

quizzes.question: أي من الممارسات التالية يُعتبر 'best practice' عند تنظيم Measures في مشروع كبير؟
options: تجميع الـ measures بـ Display Folders حسب الموضوع، استخدام prefixes واضحة (Calc_, Agg_)، كتابة وصف
ضع كل شيء في Measure واحد كبير
quizzes.explanation: التنظيم يقلل الخلط عند العودة للمشروع. Display Folders + Naming Convention + Documentation = maintainability.
quizzes.en_question: Which of the following practices is considered 'best practice' when organizing Measures in a large project?
en_options: Group measures in Display Folders by topic, use clear prefixes (Calc_, Agg_), write a description
Put everything into one big Measure
quizzes.en_explanation: Organization reduces confusion when returning to the project. Display Folders + Naming Convention + Documentation = maintainability.

quizzes.question: ما الخاصية التي يجب أن تكون صحيحة لكل عمود في Semantic Model احترافي؟
options: Data Type صحيح (Date/Integer/Text)، لا null غير متوقع، Formatting مناسب
يجب أن تكون كل الأعمدة نصية
quizzes.explanation: كل عمود يجب أن يكون مكتوب بالنوع الصحيح (Date ليس Text، Currency ليس General) وقيم مفقودة مُدارة.
quizzes.en_question: What property should be correct for every column in a professional Semantic Model?
en_options: Data Type is valid (Date/Integer/Text), no unexpected null, Formatting is appropriate
quizzes.en_explanation: Each column must be typed correctly (Date is not Text, Currency is not General) and missing values ​​are managed.

quizzes.question: ما الخطأ الشائع عند استخدام SUMPRODUCT بدل SUM مع Many-to-Many relationship؟
options: SUMPRODUCT قد يضاعف النتائج بدل حلها، الحل الأفضل: Bridge Table أو CALCULATE بـ filter واضح
quizzes.explanation: SUMPRODUCT قد يزيد التعقيد. الحل الأفضل: Bridge Table أو CALCULATE مع فلتر معرّف واضحاً.
quizzes.en_question: What is the common mistake when using SUMPRODUCT instead of SUM with a Many-to-Many relationship?
en_options: SUMPRODUCT may multiply the results instead of solving them. The best solution: Bridge Table or CALCULATE with a clear filter.
There is no difference between them
quizzes.en_explanation: SUMPRODUCT May increase complexity. The best solution: Bridge Table or CALCULATE with a clearly defined filter.

quizzes.question: إذا أردت فهم لماذا Measure معين بطيء جداً، أي أداة خارجية تستخدم؟
options: DAX Studio (لعرض Server Timings و VertiPaq Analyzer)
quizzes.explanation: DAX Studio متخصصة في التشخيص: ترى كل query duration، cache hits، و memory consumption.
quizzes.en_question: If you want to understand why a certain Measure is very slow, which external tool do you use?
en_options: DAX Studio (to view Server Timings and VertiPaq Analyzer)
quizzes.en_explanation: DAX Studio specializes in diagnostics: it sees all query duration, cache hits, and memory consumption.

quizzes.question: أي استخدام من الآتي يتطلب Power BI Embed API؟
options: دمج تقرير Power BI داخل تطبيق ويب خارجي بدون Power BI license منفصلة
عرض التقرير في Power BI Service مباشرة
quizzes.explanation: Embed API تسمح بدمج reports/dashboards في apps خارجية (محل، موقع) بدون ترخيص منفصل.
quizzes.en_question: Which of the following uses requires Power BI Embed API?
en_options: Integrate a Power BI report into an external web application without a separate Power BI license
View the report directly in Power BI Service
quizzes.en_explanation: Embed API allows embedding reports/dashboards into external applications (store, website) without a separate license.

quizzes.question: متى تصبح نسخة PBIP (Power BI Project) أفضل من PBIX التقليدية للـ git؟
options: عندما تريد version control ، merge edits من عدة مطورين، CI/CD pipelines
quizzes.explanation: PBIP (text-based) = git-friendly (readable diffs). PBIX (binary) = صعب الـ diff والـ merge.
quizzes.en_question: When does the PBIP (Power BI Project) version become better than traditional PBIX for git?
en_options: When you want version control, merge edits from multiple developers, CI/CD pipelines
quizzes.en_explanation: PBIP (text-based) = git-friendly (readable diffs). PBIX (binary) = difficult to diff and merge.

quizzes.question: في Dataflow Gen1 مقابل Gen2، ما الفرق الأساسي؟
options: Gen1 in Power BI service ، Gen2 in Fabric (أسرع، أكثر مرونة في التخزين)
quizzes.explanation: Gen2 = Fabric infrastructure = performance أفضل وتكامل أوسع مع Fabric services.
quizzes.en_question: In Dataflow Gen1 versus Gen2, what is the basic difference?
en_options: Gen1 in Power BI service, Gen2 in Fabric (faster, more flexible storage)
They are both the same thing
Gen2 does not support Power Query
quizzes.en_explanation: Gen2 = Fabric infrastructure = better performance and wider integration with Fabric services.

quizzes.question: إذا عرّفت Calculation Group بـ 3 items (YTD, PY, YoY) وطبقتها على 10 measures، كم measure فعالة الآن؟
options: تقريباً 10 (الـ items تُطبق تلقائياً على كل Measure بدون نسخ)
quizzes.explanation: Calculation Groups تُطبق على كل Measure الموجودة دون إضافتها يدويًا. توفر مساحة وتعقيد.
quizzes.en_question: If you define a Calculation Group with 3 items (YTD, PY, YoY) and apply it to 10 measures, how many effective measures do you now have?
en_options: Approximately 10 (the items are automatically applied to each measurement without copying)
quizzes.en_explanation: Calculation Groups are applied to every existing Measure without adding them manually. Saves space and complexity.

quizzes.question: ما الفرق بين Static RLS و Dynamic RLS في تطبيق؟
options: Static: أدوار ثابتة (Account vs Sales). Dynamic: قائمة على USERNAME() أو Azure AD (حسب المستخدم مباشرة)
Static يعمل مع Power BI Service فقط
quizzes.explanation: Static RLS: حسب Roles ثابتة. Dynamic: حسب USERPRINCIPALNAME() أو email المستخدم الفعلي.
quizzes.en_question: What is the difference between Static RLS and Dynamic RLS in an application?
en_options: Static: Fixed roles (Account vs Sales). Dynamic: based on USERNAME() or Azure AD (depending directly on the user)
They are both the same thing
Static works with Power BI Service only
quizzes.en_explanation: Static RLS: According to fixed roles. Dynamic: Depending on USERPRINCIPALNAME() or email of the actual user.

quizzes.question: ما المؤشر الأول الذي يشير إلى أن التقرير المنشور 'ناجح' فعلياً؟
options: استخدام متكرر من نفس الأشخاص + اعتماد عليه في القرارات + feedback إيجابي
quizzes.explanation: النجاح الحقيقي = adoption متكرر بدون مساعدة، ثقة في البيانات، استخدام في decision-making.
quizzes.en_question: What is the first indicator that the published report is actually 'successful'?
en_options: Repeated use by the same people + reliance on it in decisions + positive feedback
quizzes.en_explanation: True success = repeated unassisted adoption, trust in data, use in decision-making.

quizzes.question: ما الميزة الأكثر إثارة في Fabric Dataflows Gen2؟
options: Cloud-scale processing مع Power Query + Python ، OneLake integration ، Sharing سهل بين Workspaces
quizzes.explanation: Fabric Gen2 = powerful ETL cloud-native مع تكامل كامل مع Fabric ecosystem.
quizzes.en_question: What is the most exciting feature in Fabric Dataflows Gen2?
en_options: Cloud-scale processing with Power Query + Python, OneLake integration, easy sharing between Workspaces
quizzes.en_explanation: Fabric Gen2 = powerful ETL cloud-native with full integration with the Fabric ecosystem.

quizzes.question: عند عرض مشروع Power BI لصاحب عمل أو مقابلة وظيفية، ما الترتيب الأمثل؟
options: المشكلة → المصادر → النموذج → الـ KPIs → الرؤى → الأثر على العمل
quizzes.explanation: عرض احترافي يبدأ بالـ 'Why' (المشكلة) ثم يتدرج نزولاً إلى 'What' و 'How' والنتائج النهائية.
quizzes.en_question: When presenting a Power BI project to a business owner or job interview, what is the optimal order?
en_options: Problem → Sources → Model → KPIs → Insights → Business Impact
quizzes.en_explanation: A professional presentation that begins with 'Why' (the problem) and then progresses down to 'What', 'How' and the final results.

quizzes.question: بعد إنشاء Field Parameter 'Sales Metric' يحتوي Revenue و Profit، كيف تستخدمه في visual؟
options: اسحب 'Sales Metric' الـ parameter للـ visual ، ثم ضع Measure ديناميكية تستخدم SELECTEDVALUE()
quizzes.explanation: Field Parameters تحتاج slicing visual + calculated Measure يستخدم SELECTEDVALUE() للمقياس المختار.
quizzes.en_question: After creating a Field Parameter 'Sales Metric' containing Revenue and Profit, how do you use it in a visual?
en_options: Drag the 'Sales Metric' parameter to the visual, then set a dynamic measure using SELECTEDVALUE()
quizzes.en_explanation: Field Parameters need slicing visual + calculated Measure SELECTEDVALUE() is used for the chosen measure.

quizzes.question: إذا كان لديك Slowly Changing Dimension وأردت تحليل بيانات تاريخية صحيح، ما الاحتياطي الأساسي؟
options: استخدم SCD Type 2 مع ValidFrom و ValidTo dates في Fact Table joins بالتاريخ الصحيح
احفظ كل الإصدارات في نفس الصف
quizzes.explanation: SCD Type 2 يحتفظ بالتاريخ كاملاً. عند الربط مع Fact، استخدم Date Range Joins للحصول على البيانات الصحيحة.
quizzes.en_question: If you have a Slowly Changing Dimension and want correct historical data analysis, what is the basic precaution?
en_options: Use SCD Type 2 with ValidFrom and ValidTo dates in Fact Table joins with the correct date
Save all versions in the same row
quizzes.en_explanation: SCD Type 2 retains full history. When joining with Fact, use Date Range Joins to get the correct data.

quizzes.question: أي من الخطوات التالية في Power Query قد تعطّل Query Folding غالباً؟
options: استخدام دوال Python مخصصة، Custom Functions ، أو INDEX/RANGE() بدون حدود واضحة
quizzes.explanation: Query Folding ينكسر عند: custom functions، transformations غير مدعومة، أو قيود معقدة.
quizzes.en_question: Which of the following steps in Power Query can commonly break Query Folding?
en_options: Use custom Python functions, Custom Functions, or INDEX/RANGE() without explicit limits
quizzes.en_explanation: Query Folding breaks when: custom functions, transformations are not supported, or complex constraints.

quizzes.question: في Tabular Editor، ما الأداة الرئيسية لاكتشاف مشاكل النموذج قبل النشر؟
options: Best Practice Analyzer (BPA) - يفحص naming ، properties ، configurations
quizzes.explanation: BPA يوفر recommendations على مشاكل شائعة: Naming violations، غياب descriptions، relationships ضعيفة.
quizzes.en_question: In Tabular Editor, what is the main tool to discover model problems before publishing?
en_options: Best Practice Analyzer (BPA) - examines naming, properties, configurations
quizzes.en_explanation: BPA provides recommendations on common problems: Naming violations, missing descriptions, poor relationships.

quizzes.question: ما فائدة 'Sync Metadata' في Tabular Editor عند العمل على نفس Workspace مع زملاء؟
options: تحديث نسخة local من metadata مع آخر حالة بالسحابة لتجنب التضارب
quizzes.explanation: Sync Metadata ضروري في بيئة تعاونية: تنزل آخر تحديثات من Service قبل البدء بـ edits جديدة.
quizzes.en_question: What is the benefit of 'Sync Metadata' in Tabular Editor when working on the same Workspace with colleagues?
en_options: Update the local copy of metadata with the latest state in the cloud to avoid conflicts
quizzes.en_explanation: Sync Metadata is essential in a collaborative environment: downloads the latest updates from the Service before starting new edits.

quizzes.question: عند حساب 'Same Period Last Year' (SPLY) صحيح، ما الشرط الأساسي عن الحسابات التاريخية؟
options: Date Table يجب أن تكون sequential بدون فجوات، و Fact dates يجب تغطي كلا السنتين
quizzes.explanation: SPLY يفترض Date Table محكمة وبيانات متوازية. DATEADD(-365) ليس دقيقاً لـ leap years.
quizzes.en_question: When calculating 'Same Period Last Year' (SPLY) correctly, what is the basic requirement for historical calculations?
en_options: Date Table must be sequential without gaps, and Fact dates must cover both years
quizzes.en_explanation: SPLY assumes a tight Date Table and parallel data. DATEADD(-365) is not accurate for leap years.

quizzes.question: إذا عملت deployment pipeline مع 3 stages (Dev → Test → Prod)، متى تستخدم 'Selective Deployment'؟
options: عندما تريد نقل report محدد بدون نقل كل الـ workspace (مثل: fix واحد فقط)
quizzes.explanation: Selective Deployment يسمح بـ granular control: تختار أي report/dataflow تنقل دون باقي الـ workspace.
quizzes.en_question: If you have a deployment pipeline with 3 stages (Dev → Test → Prod), when do you use 'Selective Deployment'?
en_options: When you want to move a specific report without moving the entire workspace (eg: fix only one)
quizzes.en_explanation: Selective Deployment allows granular control: you choose which report/dataflow to transfer without the rest of the workspace.

quizzes.question: إذا كان لديك 5 مصادر بيانات مختلفة بحاجة توحيد وتحليل، أي نقطة قوة يوفرها Power BI؟
options: القدرة على الربط بين مصادر مختلفة في نموذج واحد وإنشاء تقارير موحدة
quizzes.explanation: Power BI يدعم مصادر متعددة بسهولة: بناء نموذج موحد وتحليل متقاطع بين مصادر مختلفة.
quizzes.en_question: If you have 5 different data sources that need to be unified and analyzed, what strength does Power BI provide?
en_options: The ability to link different sources in one form and create unified reports
quizzes.en_explanation: Power BI supports multiple sources with ease: build a unified model and cross-analyze different sources.

quizzes.question: ما أول خطوة عملية عند بدء مشروع Power BI جديد من الصفر؟
options: فهم المشكلة والبيانات المتاحة، ثم تثبيت Desktop و استيراد البيانات
فتح Desktop وإنشاء رسوم بيانية مباشرة
تعلم كل الـ DAX قبل البدء
quizzes.explanation: البدء الصحيح: فهم المتطلبات → تثبيت Desktop → استيراد البيانات → بناء النموذج بتدرج.
quizzes.en_question: What is the first practical step when starting a new Power BI project from scratch?
en_options: Understand the problem and available data, then install Desktop and import the data
Open Desktop and create live charts
Learn all about DAX before starting
quizzes.en_explanation: Getting started: Understand the requirements → Desktop installation → Import data → Build the model step by step.

quizzes.question: أي طريقة احترافية للتعامل مع 'Source Data Not Found' عند الربط مع Excel الذي انتقل لمجلد آخر؟
options: استخدام Folder Data Source أو تعريف path يُحدث تلقائياً، بدل hardcoding المسار
نقل الملف يدويًا في كل مرة
quizzes.explanation: Folder connector يقرأ آخر نسخة في المجلد. Dynamic paths أفضل من hardcoded paths.
quizzes.en_question: What is a professional way to handle 'Source Data Not Found' when connecting to an Excel file that moved to another folder?
en_options: Use a Folder Data Source or path definition that updates automatically, instead of hardcoding the path
Delete the query and redo everything
Transfer the file manually every time
quizzes.en_explanation: Folder connector reads the last copy in the folder. Dynamic paths are better than hardcoded paths.

quizzes.question: في جدول مبيعات، اكتشفت 50% من قيم 'Product Category' فارغة. ما أول سؤال تسأله قبل الحل؟
options: هل هذه بيانات مشروعة (missing)؟ أم خطأ في الاستخراج؟ ثم فقرر: ملء / حذف / الاحتفاظ
quizzes.explanation: معرفة السبب أولاً توجه الحل: غياب مشروع ≠ خطأ. القرار يعتمد على الفهم.
quizzes.en_question: In a sales table, you discovered 50% of 'Product Category' values are empty. What is the first question you ask before solving?
en_options: Is this legitimate data (missing)? Or an error in extraction? Then decide: fill / delete / keep
quizzes.en_explanation: Knowing the reason first guides the solution: absence of a project ≠ error. The decision depends on understanding.

quizzes.question: عند استيراد 10 ملفات Excel بنفس البنية من مجلد واحد، ما أفضل طريقة Power Query؟
options: استخدام Folder connector و Combine Files لدمجها تلقائياً بدل نسخ يدوي
quizzes.explanation: Combine Files automation توفر الوقت والأخطاء عند التعامل مع ملفات متعددة متشابهة.
quizzes.en_question: When importing 10 Excel files with the same structure from one folder, what is the best Power Query method?
en_options: Use Folder connector and Combine Files to combine them automatically instead of manually copying them
quizzes.en_explanation: Combine Files automation saves time and errors when dealing with multiple similar files.

quizzes.question: إذا اكتشفت أن جدول 'Orders' يحتوي على 10 مليون صف و 'Customers' على 100K صف فقط، أي نوع جدول كل واحد؟
options: Orders = Fact (ملايين الحركات)، Customers = Dimension (جداول صغيرة للتفاصيل)
quizzes.explanation: Fact = statements مفصلة (كبيرة). Dimension = وصف (صغيرة). النسبة مؤشر قوي.
quizzes.en_question: If you discover that the 'Orders' table contains 10 million rows and 'Customers' only 100K rows, what type of table is each?
en_options: Orders = Fact (millions of transactions), Customers = Dimension (small tables of details)
quizzes.en_explanation: Fact = detailed (large) statements. Dimension = description (small). The ratio is a strong indicator.

quizzes.question: عند ربط جدولي Orders و OrderDetails (1:*)، من يجب أن يكون key؟
options: OrderID من Orders (جدول واحد) يربط مع OrderID في OrderDetails (متعدد)
quizzes.explanation: 1:* العلاقة: المفتاح الأجنبي في جدول الكثير (many) يشير للمفتاح الأساسي (واحد).
quizzes.en_question: When linking two tables Orders and OrderDetails (1:*), which should be the key?
en_options: OrderID of Orders (single table) joins with OrderID in OrderDetails (multiple)
quizzes.en_explanation: 1:* Relationship: The foreign key in the many table refers to the primary key (one).

quizzes.question: عند بناء Date Table يدويًا، أي عمود يجب أن يكون الـ Primary Key؟
quizzes.explanation: Date Column = PK (تاريخ كامل بدون تكرار). يُستخدم لربط مع Fact tables.
quizzes.en_question: When building a Date Table manually, which column should be the Primary Key?
quizzes.en_explanation: Date Column = PK (complete date without repetition). Used to link with Fact tables.

quizzes.question: أثناء بناء Hierarchy لـ Geography (Country → City → Store)، ما الترتيب الصحيح؟
options: Country ← City ← Store (من الأعم إلى الأخص لـ drill down منطقي)
quizzes.explanation: Drill down يعني النزول من العام للخاص: من Country بتفاصيل حتى Store محدد.
quizzes.en_question: While building a Hierarchy for Geography (Country → City → Store), what is the correct order?
en_options: Country ← City ← Store (from most general to specific for drill down makes sense)
quizzes.en_explanation: Drill down means going from general to specific: from Country with details up to a specific Store.

quizzes.question: أي من الآتي أفضل لحساب النسبة المئوية للربح: Calculated Column أم Measure؟
options: Measure (يُحسب حسب السياق، لا يأخذ مساحة)
quizzes.explanation: النسب والمقاييس → Measure . الأعمدة المشتقة من صفوف محددة → Calculated Column .
quizzes.en_question: Which of the following is better for calculating profit percentage: Calculated Column or Measure?
en_options: Measure (calculates based on context, does not take up space)
quizzes.en_explanation: Ratios and measures → Measure. Columns derived from specific rows → Calculated Column.

quizzes.question: عند كتابة معادلة DAX تقول 'إذا كانت الفئة = Electronics فقيمة 1.2x، وإلا 1x'، أي دالة تستخدم؟
options: IF أو SWITCH (IF للشرط واحد، SWITCH للحالات متعددة)
quizzes.explanation: للشروط المنطقية بسيطة: IF. للحالات متعددة: SWITCH (أوضح وأسرع).
quizzes.en_question: When writing a DAX formula that says 'if category = Electronics then 1.2x, else 1x', which function do you use?
en_options: IF or SWITCH (IF for single condition, SWITCH for multiple conditions)
quizzes.en_explanation: For simple logical conditions: IF. For multiple situations: SWITCH (clearer, faster).

quizzes.question: إذا أردت حساب 'Total Sales' للعملاء الذين اشتروا أكثر من 5 مرات، ما الدالة الأنسب؟
options: CALCULATE + FILTER لتطبيق شرط إضافي على Customers
quizzes.explanation: CALCULATE مع FILTER يسمح بشروط معقدة على أي جدول قبل حساب Measure .
quizzes.en_question: If you want to calculate 'Total Sales' for customers who bought more than 5 times, what is the most appropriate function?
en_options: CALCULATE + FILTER Applies an additional condition to Customers
SUMIF without the rest of the context
quizzes.en_explanation: CALCULATE with FILTER allows complex conditions on any table before calculating Measure.

quizzes.question: عند حساب 'Revenue per Customer' (إجمالي revenue لكل عميل)، هل تستخدم SUM أم SUMX؟
options: SUMX لأنه يمر عميل بعميل ويجمع revenue كل واحد
quizzes.explanation: SUMX = Row Context . يمكنك حساب value لكل row ثم تجميع الـ results.
quizzes.en_question: When calculating 'Revenue per Customer' (total revenue per customer), do you use SUM or SUMX?
en_options: SUMX because it goes customer by customer and collects revenue for each one
quizzes.en_explanation: SUMX = Row Context . You can calculate the value for each row and then collect the results.

quizzes.question: عند حساب 'Running Total' (إجمالي تراكمي)، أي دالة زمنية تساعد؟
options: CALCULATE مع ارتباط Date Table + TOTALYTD أو معادلة مخصصة
quizzes.explanation: Running Total يحتاج سياق تاريخي. TOTALYTD يحسب من بداية السنة حتى اليوم المحدد.
quizzes.en_question: When calculating 'Running Total' (cumulative total), which time function helps?
en_options: CALCULATE with Date Table + TOTALYTD link or custom formula
quizzes.en_explanation: Running Total needs historical context. TOTALYTD is calculated from the beginning of the year until the specified day.

quizzes.question: عند عرض 'Top 10 Products بالمبيعات'، أي visual أنسب؟
options: Horizontal Bar Chart (يسهل قراءة الأسماء الطويلة وترتيب سهل)
quizzes.explanation: Bar horizontal أفضل للمقارنات المرتبة (Ranking). Pie صعب للـ rankings وأكثر من 5 عناصر.
quizzes.en_question: When displaying 'Top 10 Products by Sales', which visual is most appropriate?
en_options: Horizontal Bar Chart (long names are easy to read and easy to arrange)
quizzes.en_explanation: Bar horizontal is better for ranked comparisons. Pie is difficult for rankings and more than 5 items.

quizzes.question: أين يُعرّف ملف Theme في Power BI Desktop؟
quizzes.explanation: Theme JSON يُحمّل من قائمة View. يحتوي على color codes و font definitions.
quizzes.en_question: Where is a Theme file defined in Power BI Desktop?
quizzes.en_explanation: Theme JSON is loaded from the View menu. Contains color codes and font definitions.

quizzes.question: إذا أردت إظهار mini chart (مخطط مصغّر) عند hover على نقطة، أي ميزة تستخدم؟
options: Custom Tooltip Page (صفحة منفصلة بـ visuals صغيرة)
quizzes.explanation: Custom Tooltip يمكن أن تحتوي صفحة منفصلة بـ visuals (table, chart) تظهر عند hover.
quizzes.en_question: If you want to show a mini chart when hovering over a point, which feature do you use?
en_options: Custom Tooltip Page (separate page with small visuals)
quizzes.en_explanation: Custom Tooltip can contain a separate page with visuals (table, chart) that appear on hover.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Conditional Formatting مع 'Data Bar'، متى تصبح مفيدة أكثر؟
options: عند مقارنة قيم في جدول (مثل: sales numbers) لرؤية الأضخم بسرعة
quizzes.explanation: Data Bars + Conditional Format تساعد في Scan نسبي للبيانات في الجداول بسهولة.
quizzes.en_question: When using Conditional Formatting with 'Data Bar', when does it become more useful?
en_options: When comparing values ​​in a table (eg sales numbers) to quickly see which ones are the largest
quizzes.en_explanation: Data Bars + Conditional Format helps in relative scanning of data in tables easily.

quizzes.question: إذا كان لديك Dashboard بـ 4 صفحات وتريد slicer واحد يؤثر على جميعها، ما الحل؟
options: Sync Slicers (تفعيل المزامنة من Format Pane)
نسخ slicer لكل صفحة بشكل منفصل
quizzes.explanation: Sync Slicers تجعل اختيار واحد يؤثر على أكثر من صفحة (إن كانت الـ data structure compatible).
quizzes.en_question: If you have a Dashboard with 4 pages and want one slicer to affect all of them, what is the solution?
en_options: Sync Slicers (enable sync from Format Pane)
Copy slicer for each page separately
quizzes.en_explanation: Sync Slicers make one selection affect more than one page (if the data structure is compatible).

quizzes.question: عند إعداد Drillthrough من 'Regional Sales' إلى 'Store Details'، ما الفلتر الذي يجب تحديده؟
options: استخدم Region من السياق الحالي وفلتر store details بها تلقائياً
quizzes.explanation: Drillthrough يحتاج field مشترك: Region clicked → يفلتر Destination page حسبها.
quizzes.en_question: When setting up Drillthrough from 'Regional Sales' to 'Store Details', what filter should be selected?
en_options: Use Region from the current context and store details filter in it automatically
quizzes.en_explanation: Drillthrough requires a shared field: Region clicked → Destination page is filtered accordingly.

quizzes.question: في Bookmarks، ما الذي لا يُحفظ?
options: الـ Measures و DAX definitions (فقط حالة الـ visual)
quizzes.explanation: Bookmark يحفظ snapshot: visual states و visibility و slicer selection. لا يحفظ الـ model نفسه.
quizzes.en_question: In Bookmarks, what's not saved?
en_options: Measures and DAX definitions (only in case of visual)
quizzes.en_explanation: Bookmark saves snapshot: visual states, visibility, and slicer selection. The model does not save itself.

quizzes.question: عند تصميم mobile layout، كم عمود تستخدم عادة على شاشة 4-5 بوصات؟
quizzes.explanation: Mobile = single column أو 2 أعمدة ضيقة جداً. الهدف: سهولة التمرير والقراءة بإصبع واحد.
quizzes.en_question: When designing mobile layout, how many columns do you usually use on a 4-5 inch screen?
en_options: No need for a separate design
quizzes.en_explanation: Mobile = single column or 2 very narrow columns. The goal: easy scrolling and reading with one finger.

quizzes.question: عند تطبيق RLS على Employee ID، ما السؤال الأمني الأساسي قبل النشر؟
options: هل User يعرف Employee ID خاصه؟ وهل أنا متأكد من mapping بين Azure AD و Employee ID ؟
quizzes.explanation: RLS فعال فقط إذا كان الـ mapping صحيح بين Azure AD users و business logic filters.
quizzes.en_question: When applying RLS to Employee ID, what is the basic security question before publishing?
en_options: Does User know his own Employee ID? Am I sure about the mapping between Azure AD and Employee ID?
RLS is always safe without checking
quizzes.en_explanation: RLS is only effective if the mapping is correct between Azure AD users and business logic filters.

quizzes.question: قبل publish للـ Service، أي خطوة أمنية غالباً تُنسى؟
options: تفقد أن الـ credentials و sensitive info لا توجد مكشوفة في الـ visuals أو Measure comments
quizzes.explanation: قبل النشر: مراجعة أي credentials، connection strings، أو بيانات حساسة مكشوفة.
quizzes.en_question: Before publishing to Service, which security step is often forgotten?
en_options: Check that credentials and sensitive info are not exposed in the visuals or measure comments
quizzes.en_explanation: Before publishing: Review any credentials, connection strings, or sensitive data that is exposed.

quizzes.question: إذا كان التقرير بطيء جداً، أي عنصر تفحصه أولاً؟
options: عدد الصفوف في النموذج و cardinality الـ relationships
quizzes.explanation: أداء = بيانات + model. الملايين الصفوف + cardinality ضعيفة = بطء محقق.
quizzes.en_question: If the report is very slow, which element do you check first?
en_options: The number of rows in the model and the cardinality of the relationships
quizzes.en_explanation: performance=data+model. Millions of rows + weak cardinality = real slowness.

quizzes.question: عند ظهور 'Too many attributes' في Power Query، ما الحل الأول؟
options: حذف الأعمدة غير الضرورية قبل التحميل (عدم إخضاع كل شيء للنموذج)
quizzes.explanation: مبدأ: import فقط ما تحتاج. كل عمود = memory extra. التنظيف المبكر = أداء أفضل.
quizzes.en_question: When 'Too many attributes' appears in Power Query, what is the first solution?
en_options: Delete unnecessary columns before loading (not submitting everything to the form)
quizzes.en_explanation: Principle: Import only what you need. Each column = memory extra. Early cleaning = better performance.

quizzes.question: إذا كان refresh غالي جداً، أي استراتيجية تقلل التكاليف؟
options: Incremental Refresh + تقليل frequency + ضغط البيانات غير الضرورية
quizzes.explanation: تقليل التكاليف = refresh فقط البيانات الجديدة (Incremental) بدل كل شيء في كل مرة.
quizzes.en_question: If refresh is too expensive, which strategy reduces costs?
en_options: Incremental Refresh + Reduce frequency + Compress unnecessary data
quizzes.en_explanation: Reducing costs = refreshing only new data (Incremental) instead of everything each time.

quizzes.question: عند الحاجة لـ Clustering Analysis على sales data، كيف تستخدم Python؟
options: استخدم Python visualization (sklearn) في Power Query or Power BI visuals scripting
Python لا يعمل مع Power BI
quizzes.explanation: Python في Power Query يسمح بـ advanced analytics (K-means, etc) قبل دخول البيانات للـ model.
quizzes.en_question: When needing Clustering Analysis on sales data, how do you use Python?
en_options: Use Python visualization (sklearn) in Power Query or Power BI visual scripting
Python does not work with Power BI
quizzes.en_explanation: Python in Power Query allows advanced analytics (K-means, etc) before data enters the model.

quizzes.question: أي سيناريو يتطلب Paginated Reports بدل Power BI Reports؟
options: تقرير مالي رسمي يحتاج طباعة دقيقة، pages متكررة، PDF form submission
quizzes.explanation: Paginated = pixel-perfect printing. Power BI = visual first. اختر حسب الحاجة.
quizzes.en_question: Which scenario requires Paginated Reports instead of Power BI Reports?
en_options: An official financial report requires precise printing, repeated pages, and PDF submission form
quizzes.en_explanation: Paginated = pixel-perfect printing. Power BI = visual first. Choose as needed.

quizzes.question: إذا قررت تحديث dataset كل 15 دقيقة، ما التأثير المحتمل؟
options: استهلاك capacity متكرر + تكاليف أعلى. السؤال: هل البيانات تتغير كل 15 دقيقة فعلاً؟
quizzes.explanation: Refresh cadence يجب أن يمثل حقيقة البيانات: كل 15 دقيقة؟ كل ساعة؟ يومي؟
quizzes.en_question: If you decide to refresh the dataset every 15 minutes, what is the likely impact?
en_options: Frequent capacity consumption + higher costs. Question: Does the data really change every 15 minutes?
quizzes.en_explanation: Refresh cadence should represent the data truth: every 15 minutes? Every hour? daily?

quizzes.question: عند أتمتة توزيع تقرير عبر بريد يومي لـ 100 مستقبل، أي طريقة أفضل؟
options: Power Automate Flow + Power BI Report في email (Embed مع View permissions محدد)
quizzes.explanation: Power Automate توزيع موثوقة: عرض مباشر في البريد + RLS إذا لزم (كل واحد يرى بيانته).
quizzes.en_question: When automating distribution of a report via email daily to 100 recipients, which method is better?
en_options: Power Automate Flow + Power BI Report in email (Embed with View permissions selected)
quizzes.en_explanation: Power Automate Reliable distribution: direct display in mail + RLS if necessary (everyone sees his data).

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Personal Gateway بدل Enterprise Gateway، ما القيود؟
options: Personal Gateway يعمل فقط عند تشغيل Desktop + بدون Refresh مُجدول موثوق (Enterprise أفضل)
quizzes.explanation: Personal Gateway = مؤقت و device-dependent. Enterprise = موثوق و 24/7. اختر حسب الحاجة.
quizzes.en_question: When using Personal Gateway instead of Enterprise Gateway, what are the limitations?
en_options: Personal Gateway only works when running Desktop+ without a reliable scheduled Refresh (Enterprise is better)
They are both the same thing
quizzes.en_explanation: Personal Gateway = temporary and device-dependent. Enterprise = Reliable and 24/7. Choose as needed.

quizzes.question: في مشروع ضخم بـ 2 billion صفوف، ما أول شيء قبل استخدام Incremental Refresh؟
options: تحديد عمود DateTime واضح، تحديد فترات retention (مثل: 2 سنة تاريخ + 7 أيام حالي)
quizzes.explanation: Incremental يحتاج تخطيط: partition strategy واضحة (historical + rolling incremental).
quizzes.en_question: In a huge project with 2 billion rows, what is the first thing before using Incremental Refresh?
en_options: Define a clear DateTime column, specify retention periods (eg: 2 years date + 7 days current)
quizzes.en_explanation: Incremental needs planning: clear partition strategy (historical + rolling incremental).

quizzes.question: عند كتابة Query Folding-friendly step، أي من هذه العمليات تدعمها أغلب databases؟
options: Filter ، Select (columns)، Group By (مدعومة في SQL). بدل: Custom Functions أو Python
quizzes.explanation: Folding-friendly: عمليات قياسية SQL (WHERE, SELECT, GROUP BY). تجنب: Custom logic, Python.
quizzes.en_question: When writing a Query Folding-friendly step, which of these operations do most databases support?
en_options: Filter, Select (columns), Group By (supported in SQL). Replace: Custom Functions or Python
quizzes.en_explanation: Folding-friendly: Standard SQL operations (WHERE, SELECT, GROUP BY). Avoid: Custom logic, Python.

quizzes.question: عند اختيار DirectQuery، ما الشرط الأول لـ database؟
options: Database يجب أن يكون سريع جداً (response < 1 sec لـ queries غالباً)
quizzes.explanation: DirectQuery = كل interaction يبعث query مباشرة. بطء database = تقرير بطيء.
quizzes.en_question: When choosing DirectQuery, what is the first requirement for the database?
en_options: Database must be very fast (response < 1 sec for queries often)
quizzes.en_explanation: DirectQuery = Every interaction sends a query directly. slow database = slow report.

quizzes.question: عند نسخ Semantic Model من Production إلى Development باستخدام Tabular Editor، ما الحذر الأساسي؟
options: التحقق من connection strings و credentials قبل test (قد تشير لـ Prod database)
quizzes.explanation: عند النسخ: credentials قد تتساقط من Prod. تحقق وحدّث قبل الاستخدام في Dev.
quizzes.en_question: When copying a Semantic Model from Production to Development using Tabular Editor, what is the basic caution?
en_options: Check connection strings and credentials before test (may refer to Prod database)
quizzes.en_explanation: When copying: credentials may drop from Prod. Check and update before using in Dev.

quizzes.question: إذا كان عندك bug في Prod report وأردت hotfix سريع، كيف تتعامل مع deployment pipeline؟
options: Fix في Dev → Test → Prod (احترام الـ pipeline) بدل skip مباشر لـ Prod (risky)
quizzes.explanation: Pipelines موجودة لـ safety: كل مرحلة اختبار. حتى بسرعة: احترم المراحل.
quizzes.en_question: If you have a bug in a Prod report and want a quick hotfix, how do you handle the deployment pipeline?
en_options: Fix in Dev → Test → Prod (respect the pipeline) instead of skip directly for Prod (risky)
quizzes.en_explanation: Pipelines exist for safety: every testing phase. Even quickly: respect the stages.

quizzes.question: في مقارنة بين Power BI و Tableau و Qlik، ما الميزة الفريدة لـ Power BI؟
options: التكامل الكامل مع Microsoft ecosystem (Excel, Azure, Office 365) + التسعير في متناول الشركات الصغيرة
quizzes.explanation: قوة Power BI: التكامل العميق مع منتجات Microsoft + تسعير منافس + خيارات سعة مختلفة.
quizzes.en_question: In a comparison between Power BI, Tableau, and Qlik, what is the unique advantage of Power BI?
en_options: Full integration with the Microsoft ecosystem (Excel, Azure, Office 365) + affordable pricing for small businesses
quizzes.en_explanation: Power of Power BI: Deep integration with Microsoft products + competitive pricing + various capacity options.

quizzes.question: في نظام OLTP، ما معدل التحديثات المتوقع على سجل واحد؟
quizzes.explanation: OLTP مصمم للتحديثات المتكررة والسريعة: بيع منتج، تحديث حساب، إضافة عميل.
quizzes.en_question: In an OLTP system, what is the expected update rate for one record?
quizzes.en_explanation: OLTP is designed for frequent, fast updates: selling a product, updating an account, adding a customer.

quizzes.question: في جدول 'Employees' مع مرتبات متغيرة، إذا أردت تحليل تاريخي صحيح للرواتب، أي SCD type تختار؟
quizzes.explanation: Type 2 = احتفظ بكل الإصدارات مع تاريخ. لذا كل ارتفاع راتب = صف جديد بتاريخ بداية.
quizzes.en_question: In an 'Employees' table with varying salaries, if you want correct historical salary analysis, which SCD type do you choose?
quizzes.en_explanation: Type 2 = Keep all versions with history. So each salary hike = a new row with a start date.

quizzes.question: في علاقة Many-to-Many بين Employees و Projects (موظف يعمل بـ عدة مشاريع)، ما اسم Bridge الشائع؟
quizzes.explanation: تسمية واضحة: [Entity1][Entity2] أو [Entity1]_[Entity2]. يجعل الـ naming convention منطقي.
quizzes.en_question: In a Many-to-Many relationship between Employees and Projects (one employee works on multiple projects), what is the common Bridge table name?
quizzes.en_explanation: Clear label: [Entity1][Entity2] or [Entity1]_[Entity2]. Makes naming convention logical.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام 'Remove Errors' في Power Query من 10 مليون صف، هل يفقد Query Folding؟
quizzes.explanation: نعم، Remove Errors = Custom function غير مدعومة في folding. البيانات كاملة تُسحب ثم تُنظف محليًا.
quizzes.en_question: When using 'Remove Errors' in Power Query from 10 million rows, does it lose Query Folding?
quizzes.en_explanation: Yes, Remove Errors = Custom function is not supported in folding. The entire data is pulled and then cleaned locally.

quizzes.question: عند اختيار DirectQuery على 500K row table، ما المخاطر المحتملة؟
options: أداء بطيء جداً إذا كانت قاعدة البيانات بطيئة، قيود DAX أكثر
quizzes.explanation: DirectQuery مع 500K row + بطء database = timeout + تجربة سيئة. Import أفضل غالباً.
quizzes.en_question: When choosing DirectQuery on a 500K row table, what are the potential risks?
en_options: Very slow performance If the database is slow, DAX has more limitations
quizzes.en_explanation: DirectQuery with 500K row + slow database = timeout + bad experience. Import is often better.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Tabular Editor، ما الميزة التي لا توجد في Power BI Desktop؟
options: تعديل TMDL/JSON files مباشرة + تعديلات جماعية + Version Control support
quizzes.explanation: Tabular Editor = editor نصي للـ Model. TMDL format = git-friendly. Desktop = GUI فقط.
quizzes.en_question: When using Tabular Editor, what feature is not in Power BI Desktop?
en_options: Edit TMDL/JSON files directly + bulk edits + Version Control support
quizzes.en_explanation: Tabular Editor = Text editor for Model. TMDL format = git-friendly. Desktop = GUI only.

quizzes.question: عند حساب 'Same Period Last Month' بدقة، أي دالة أساسية تستخدم؟
options: SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR أو معادلة مخصصة مع DATEADD
quizzes.explanation: SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR يحسب نفس الفترة من سنة ماضية (1 سنة بالضبط). -30 days خطأ (leap months).
quizzes.en_question: When calculating 'Same Period Last Month' accurately, which basic function do you use?
en_options: SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR or custom equation with DATEADD
quizzes.en_explanation: SAMEPERIODLASTYEAR Calculates the same period from last year (exactly 1 year). -30 days error (leap months).

quizzes.question: عند بناء 'Forecast vs Actual' dashboard، ما البيانات الأساسية المطلوبة؟
options: Actual sales (من التاريخ) + Forecast (من planning) + Date table منفصلة
quizzes.explanation: Forecast vs Actual = مقارنة تاريخية. يحتاج جداول منفصلة أو أعمدة واضحة في نفس الجدول.
quizzes.en_question: When building a 'Forecast vs Actual' dashboard, what basic data is required?
en_options: Actual sales (from date) + Forecast (from planning) + Date table are separate
quizzes.en_explanation: Forecast vs Actual = historical comparison. It needs separate tables or clear columns in the same table.

quizzes.question: عند تسمية Measures في نموذج احترافي، أي من الآتي يُعتبر اسماً سيئاً؟
quizzes.explanation: أسماء سيئة: أسماء مؤقتة، '_old'، '_Copy'. الأسماء الجيدة واضحة وتصف القيمة الحقيقية.
quizzes.en_question: When naming Measures in a professional model, which of the following is considered a bad name?
quizzes.en_explanation: Bad names: temporary names, '_old', '_Copy'. Good names are clear and describe the true value.

quizzes.question: عند بناء Measure يعتمد على relationship Many-to-One، أي خطأ شائع قد يحدث؟
options: استخدام SUM مباشرة دون CALCULATE يضاعف النتائج عند التجميع من كثير side
quizzes.explanation: خطأ شائع: نسيان CALCULATE/SUMPRODUCT/DISTINCT. النتيجة = Cartesian product و تضخيم.
quizzes.en_question: When building a Measure that depends on a Many-to-One relationship, what common mistake can happen?
en_options: Using SUM directly without CALCULATE doubles the results when grouping from many sides
quizzes.en_explanation: Common mistake: Forgetting CALCULATE/SUMPRODUCT/DISTINCT. Result = Cartesian product and amplification.

quizzes.question: أي أداة خارجية تساعد في اكتشاف cardinality violations في النموذج؟
quizzes.explanation: BPA يحذر من cardinality كثيف والـ relationships ضعيفة + naming issues و performance anti-patterns.
quizzes.en_question: Which external tool helps discover cardinality violations in the model?
quizzes.en_explanation: BPA warns of heavy cardinality and weak relationships + naming issues and performance anti-patterns.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Power BI REST APIs لـ automation، أي permission ضروري؟
options: Service Principal مع App Registration + Power BI Admin consent
quizzes.explanation: APIs تحتاج Service Principal (app identity) مع proper scopes و Admin approval لـ tenant-level access.
quizzes.en_question: When using Power BI REST APIs for automation, which permission is necessary?
en_options: Service Principal with App Registration + Power BI Admin consent
quizzes.en_explanation: APIs require Service Principal (app identity) with proper scopes and Admin approval for tenant-level access.

quizzes.question: عند merge editing من فريقين على نفس Semantic Model في git، ما الأداة الأفضل؟
options: PBIP format + Tabular Editor (TMDL text-based ، سهل diff و merge)
quizzes.explanation: PBIP = text files = git-friendly. PBIX = binary = conflict nightmare. PBIP هو المستقبل.
quizzes.en_question: When merge editing from two teams on the same Semantic Model in git, which is the best tool?
en_options: PBIP format + Tabular Editor (TMDL text-based, easy diff and merge)
quizzes.en_explanation: PBIP = text files = git-friendly. PBIX = binary = conflict nightmare. PBIP is the future.

quizzes.question: عند اختيار بين Dataflow Gen2 و Power Query في Desktop، متى تختار Gen2؟
options: عندما تحتاج إعادة استخدام نفس المنطق في عدة Datasets أو عبر فرق
quizzes.explanation: Dataflow Gen2 = centralized ETL . إذا كانت تحويلات مشتركة أو Datasets متعددة، استخدم Gen2.
quizzes.en_question: When choosing between Dataflow Gen2 and Power Query in Desktop, when do you choose Gen2?
en_options: When you need to reuse the same logic in multiple Datasets or across teams
quizzes.en_explanation: Dataflow Gen2 = centralized ETL . If it is shared transformations or multiple Datasets, use Gen2.

quizzes.question: في Calculation Group بـ YTD + MTD + QTD items، ما دالة تحدد أي item مختار؟
quizzes.explanation: SELECTEDVALUE يجلب اختيار المستخدم من parameter. ثم يمكنك استخدامه في معادلات مختلفة.
quizzes.en_question: In a Calculation Group with YTD + MTD + QTD items, what function determines which item is selected?
quizzes.en_explanation: SELECTEDVALUE fetches the user's selection of parameter. Then you can use it in different equations.

quizzes.question: عند تطبيق Dynamic RLS مع USERPRINCIPALNAME()، ما الشرط الحرج؟
options: المستخدم في Azure AD يجب أن يوجد عمود matching في الـ data (مثل email_address) قابل للمقارنة
quizzes.explanation: Dynamic RLS = فلتر بناءً على هوية المستخدم. يحتاج data column يطابق email/username في Azure AD.
quizzes.en_question: When applying Dynamic RLS with USERPRINCIPALNAME(), what is the critical requirement?
en_options: User in Azure AD There must be a matching column in the data (such as email_address) that is comparable
quizzes.en_explanation: Dynamic RLS = filter based on user identity. Data column needs to match email/username in Azure AD.

quizzes.question: عند مراقبة تقرير، أي من الآتي مؤشر حقيقي على نجاح بعد النشر؟
options: استخدام متكرر من نفس الأشخاص + اعتماد في القرارات + أقل من 1% error rate
quizzes.explanation: النجاح = adoption فعلي + ثقة المستخدم + استقرار النظام. Views وحده قد يكون مضلل.
quizzes.en_question: When monitoring a report, which of the following is a true indicator of success after publishing?
en_options: Repeated use by the same people + dependability in decisions + less than 1% error rate
quizzes.en_explanation: Success = actual adoption + user trust + system stability. Views alone may be misleading.

quizzes.question: متى تصبح Fabric القرار الأفضل بدل Power BI standalone؟
options: عندما تحتاج منصة data متكاملة (Data Engineering + Analytics + Science) و عدة Datasets وفرق
quizzes.explanation: Fabric = platform شاملة. Power BI = analytics فقط. Fabric إذا احتجت more than analytics.
quizzes.en_question: When does Fabric become the best choice instead of Power BI standalone?
en_options: When you need an integrated data platform (Data Engineering + Analytics + Science) and several datasets and teams
quizzes.en_explanation: Fabric = platform inclusive. Power BI = analytics only. Fabric If you need more than analytics.

quizzes.question: في مشروع Pizza Place، إذا أردت معرفة 'ساعات الذروة'، أي بيانات تحتاج من الـ fact table؟
quizzes.explanation: Peak hours = تجميع order_time بـ hour dimension. يحتاج timestamp دقيق في الـ fact.
quizzes.en_question: In a Pizza Place project, if you want to know 'peak hours', what data do you need from the fact table?
quizzes.en_explanation: Peak hours = group order_time with hour dimension. The timestamp needs to be accurate in the fact.

quizzes.question: في مشروع Online Chess، لحساب 'Win Rate by Opening'، ما الحساب الصحيح؟
quizzes.explanation: Win Rate = الفوز / الكل. يحتاج جدول Opening مع relationship إلى games وقياس الفوز.
quizzes.en_question: In an Online Chess project, to calculate 'Win Rate by Opening', what is the correct calculation?
quizzes.en_explanation: Win Rate = Win/All. Opening table with relationship needs games and win measurement.

quizzes.question: في مشروع Airbnb، إذا كان Superhost percentage ≠ غير صحيح، ما أول سبب محتمل؟
options: Relationship missing أو Many-to-Many بين listings و hosts ، مما يضاعف النتائج
quizzes.explanation: إذا كانت النتيجة مضخمة غالباً = مشكلة تصليح relationship. تحقق cardinality أولاً.
quizzes.en_question: In an Airbnb project, if the Superhost percentage is incorrect, what is the first likely reason?
en_options: Relationship missing or Many-to-Many between listings and hosts, which doubles the results
quizzes.en_explanation: If the result is often inflated = relationship repair problem. Check cardinality first.

quizzes.question: عند عرض portfolio من 3 مشاريع Power BI في مقابلة، ما الترتيب الأمثل؟
options: من الأبسط إلى الأعقد (يظهر progression) + ركز على Business Impact بدل Features
quizzes.explanation: Portfolio عرض = رحلة تصعد في التعقيد + أثر على الأعمال. يوضح مستوى خبرة حقيقي.
quizzes.en_question: When presenting a portfolio of 3 Power BI projects in an interview, what is the optimal order?
en_options: From simplest to most complex (progression shown) + Focus on Business Impact instead of Features
quizzes.en_explanation: Portfolio presentation = a journey that increases in complexity + business impact. Demonstrates a real level of experience.

quizzes.question: عند إنشاء Field Parameter 'Metrics' مع 5 measures مختلفة، كم visual تحتاج أدنى حد؟
options: visual واحد يستخدم Measure ديناميكية + Slicer للـ parameter
quizzes.explanation: Field Parameter = مرونة. Visual واحد + SELECTEDVALUE() = dynamic display لـ 5 measures مختلفة.
quizzes.en_question: When creating a Field Parameter 'Metrics' with 5 different measures, how many visuals do you need at minimum?
en_options: The visual one uses Dynamic Measure + Slicer for the parameter
quizzes.en_explanation: Field Parameter = Flexibility. Visual one + SELECTEDVALUE() = dynamic display for 5 different measures.

quizzes.question: في SCD Type 3 (تخزين نسخة سابقة واحدة)، متى تكون مفيدة؟
options: عندما تريد مقارنة سريعة current vs previous فقط (مثل price current vs previous)
quizzes.explanation: Type 3 = وسط. يعطيك current + one version back. أقل تعقيداً من Type 2 لـ limited history.
quizzes.en_question: In SCD Type 3 (storing one previous version), when is it useful?
en_options: When you want a quick comparison of current vs previous only (such as price current vs previous)
When you want the full history
quizzes.en_explanation: Type 3 = Medium. It gives you current + one version back. Less complex than Type 2 for limited history.

quizzes.question: في Bridge Table مع attributes إضافية (مثل 'Assignment Date')، كيف يبدو الـ schema؟
options: Bridge جدول: EmployeeID, ProjectID, Assignment_Date (الـ attributes في Bridge)
quizzes.explanation: Bridge يحتوي المفاتيح + أي attributes يخص الـ relationship (مثل تاريخ الانضمام).
quizzes.en_question: In a Bridge Table with additional attributes (like 'Assignment Date'), how does the schema look?
en_options: Bridge table: EmployeeID, ProjectID, Assignment_Date (the attributes in Bridge)
quizzes.en_explanation: Bridge contains the keys + any attributes related to the relationship (such as joining date).

quizzes.question: عند استخدام RELATED() في DAX، ما الشرط الأساسي؟
options: يجب أن يكون في سياق صف من الـ many side ، و relationship موجود 1:*
quizzes.explanation: RELATED = جلب من جدول one side. يحتاج Row Context من many side و relationship محكم.
quizzes.en_question: When using RELATED() in DAX, what is the basic requirement?
en_options: It must be in a many-sided row context, and relationship exists 1:*
quizzes.en_explanation: RELATED = Fetch from one side table. Row Context needs many sides and a tight relationship.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام GROUPBY في DAX، ما الفرق عن VALUES()?
options: GROUPBY أقوى: يسمح بـ aggregations مخصصة في المجموعات
quizzes.explanation: GROUPBY = advanced. يعطيك group + حساب custom داخل كل group. VALUES = list فقط.
quizzes.en_question: When using GROUPBY in DAX, what is the difference from VALUES()?
en_options: STRONGER GROUPBY: Allows custom aggregations in groups
They are both the same thing
quizzes.en_explanation: GROUPBY = advanced. It gives you a group + custom account within each group. VALUES = list only.

quizzes.question: عند استخراج رقم من نص (مثل 'Order-2024-001')، أي دوال نصية تستخدم؟
options: MID أو FIND لتحديد موضع + VALUE لتحويل للرقم
quizzes.explanation: Text parsing = FIND (موضع) + MID (استخراج) + VALUE (تحويل). أو REGEX في M Code .
quizzes.en_question: When extracting a number from text (like 'Order-2024-001'), which text functions do you use?
en_options: MID or FIND to specify a position + VALUE to convert to a number
quizzes.en_explanation: Text parsing = FIND(position) + MID(extract) + VALUE(transform). Or REGEX in M ​​Code.

quizzes.question: عند توثيق مشروع DAX كبير، ما أفضل ممارسة؟
options: Display Folders + Descriptions واضحة + Naming prefixes (Calc_, Agg_) + External doc
quizzes.explanation: Maintainability = clarity. Comments + naming + folders + external wiki = future-proof.
quizzes.en_question: When documenting a large DAX project, what is the best practice?
en_options: Display Folders + Clear Descriptions + Naming prefixes (Calc_, Agg_) + External doc
Only one documentation in the file
quizzes.en_explanation: Maintainability = clarity. Comments + naming + folders + external wiki = future-proof.

quizzes.question: عند optimize تقرير ببطء، أي من الخطوات التالية تغيير أساسي؟
options: تقليل عدد الصفوف المستورة (remove unused columns) أو استخدام Incremental Refresh
quizzes.explanation: Optimization = بيانات أقل + model أفضل + queries أسرع. UI changes = سطحي.
quizzes.en_question: When optimizing a slow report, which of the following steps is a fundamental change?
en_options: Reduce the number of unused columns or use Incremental Refresh
quizzes.en_explanation: Optimization = less data + better model + faster queries. UI changes = sketchy.

quizzes.question: عند ظهور 'Column has no values' في Power Query، ما أول فحص؟
options: هل الـ source data نفسه فيها None/empty ؟ أم الاستعلام حذف الأعمدة؟
quizzes.explanation: Root cause أولاً. قد تكون البيانات صحيحة لكن خطوة سابقة حذفت الـ data.
quizzes.en_question: When 'Column has no values' appears in Power Query, what is the first check?
en_options: Does the source data itself have None/empty? Or does the query delete columns?
quizzes.en_explanation: Root cause first. The data may be correct, but a previous step deleted the data.

quizzes.question: في Power BI Premium، إذا كانت utilization 10% فقط، ما الخطوة الأولى لتقليل التكاليف؟
options: تقليل Capacity size أو استخدام Shared Capacity + Auto Pause
quizzes.explanation: استخدام ضعيف = over-provisioned. خفض الـ SKU أو Auto Pause = توفير كبير.
quizzes.en_question: In Power BI Premium, if utilization is only 10%, what is the first step to reduce costs?
en_options: Reduce Capacity size or use Shared Capacity + Auto Pause
quizzes.en_explanation: Poor use = over-provisioned. SKU reduction or Auto Pause = huge savings.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Python في Power Query، ما القيد الأمني الأساسي؟
options: Administrator فقط يمكنه تفعيل Python scripting (security risk عالي)
quizzes.explanation: Python execution = خطر أمني. تفعيل Enterprise يحتاج Admin approval.
quizzes.en_question: When using Python in Power Query, what is the basic security restriction?
en_options: Only Administrator can activate Python scripting (high security risk)
quizzes.en_explanation: Python execution = security risk. Enterprise activation requires Admin approval.

quizzes.question: عند طباعة Paginated Report على عدة صفحات، أي feature يجب استخدام؟
quizzes.explanation: Paginated = page-oriented. breaks و repeating headers = طباعة احترافية و readable.
quizzes.en_question: When printing a Paginated Report across multiple pages, which feature should be used?
quizzes.en_explanation: Paginated = page-oriented. Breaks and repeating headers = professional, readable printing.

quizzes.question: عند تحديد Refresh Frequency، ما السؤال الذي يجب أن تسأله قبل الاختيار؟
options: كم مرة تتغير البيانات فعلاً في المصدر؟ وما tolerance للـ staleness ؟
quizzes.explanation: Cadence = business decision. عملاء تحديث كل ساعة، مالية قد تكفي يومي.
quizzes.en_question: When determining Refresh Frequency, what question should you ask before deciding?
en_options: How often does the data actually change at the source? What is tolerance for staleness?
quizzes.en_explanation: Cadence = business decision. Clients updated hourly, financials may suffice daily.

quizzes.question: عند توزيع تقرير RLS-enabled عبر Power Automate، ما التحدي الرئيسي؟
options: RLS في Email embed محدود (قد تُظهر بيانات الكل). الحل: Export PDF unique أو Direct Link
quizzes.explanation: RLS + Automation = تعقيد. Email embed قد يُظهر الكل. PDF export unique = آمن.
quizzes.en_question: When distributing an RLS-enabled report via Power Automate, what is the main challenge?
en_options: RLS in Email embed is limited (may show all data). Solution: Export unique PDF or Direct Link
quizzes.en_explanation: RLS + Automation = Complexity. Email embed may show all. PDF export unique = secure.

quizzes.question: إذا كان لديك فريق لا يعرف Power BI، ما أول خطوة تدريبية تقترحها؟
options: بدء بـ Desktop + مشروع real تحت إشرافك (learning by doing)
quizzes.explanation: Hands-on learning > theoretical. مشروع محقق = فهم سريع + ثقة.
quizzes.en_question: If you have a team that doesn't know Power BI, what is the first training step you recommend?
en_options: Start with Desktop + real project under your supervision (learning by doing)
quizzes.en_explanation: Hands-on learning > theoretical. Realized project = quick understanding + confidence.

quizzes.question: في Model View، ما الحد الأقصى المعقول لعدد الجداول المرئية قبل أن تصبح معقدة جداً؟
options: 20-30 جداول (زيادة عن ذلك = استخدم Folders في Tabular Editor)
quizzes.explanation: Model visualization يصبح غير منطقي مع جداول كثيرة. Tabular Editor أفضل للنماذج الكبيرة.
quizzes.en_question: In Model View, what is a reasonable maximum number of visible tables before it becomes too complex?
en_options: 20-30 tables (more than that = use Folders in Tabular Editor)
quizzes.en_explanation: Model visualization becomes illogical with many tables. Tabular Editor is better for large forms.

quizzes.question: عند الربط مع SharePoint list، ما الفرق بين 'From SharePoint' vs 'From OData'?
options: From SharePoint = UI-based simpler. From OData = advanced/larger lists (سحب مباشر من API)
quizzes.explanation: OData endpoint = direct API access. أفضل للـ large lists و refresh موثوق.
quizzes.en_question: When connecting to a SharePoint list, what is the difference between 'From SharePoint' vs 'From OData'?
en_options: From SharePoint = UI-based simpler. From OData = advanced/larger lists (Direct pull from API)
They are both the same thing
quizzes.en_explanation: OData endpoint = direct API access. Best for large lists and reliable refresh.

quizzes.question: عند اكتشاف 'encoding issue' في نصوص عربية (مثل أحرف غريبة)، أين المشكلة غالباً؟
options: المصدر نفسه (Excel/Database) قد يحفظ بـ encoding خاطئ، أو Power Query تقرأ بـ encoding wrong
Power BI بطبيعتها بدون دعم عربي
quizzes.explanation: Encoding = UTF-8 أفضل. المصدر + Connection settings يجب يتفق على encoding.
quizzes.en_question: When discovering an 'encoding issue' in Arabic texts (like strange characters), where is the problem usually?
en_options: The source itself (Excel/Database) may be saved with the wrong encoding, or Power Query reads with the wrong encoding.
Power BI is inherently without Arabic support
quizzes.en_explanation: Encoding = UTF-8 is better. Source + Connection settings must be agreed upon for encoding.

quizzes.question: عند استيراد ملف Excel بـ multiple sheets، ما أفضل طريقة Power Query؟
options: استخدام 'From File' + combine sheets تلقائياً، أو يدويًا merge كل sheet
quizzes.explanation: Multiple sheets = combine في Power Query أفضل من يدوي. Automation = scalable.
quizzes.en_question: When importing an Excel file with multiple sheets, what is the best Power Query method?
en_options: Use 'From File' + combine sheets automatically, or manually merge each sheet
quizzes.en_explanation: Multiple sheets = combine in Power Query is better than manual. Automation = scalable.

quizzes.question: عند كتابة custom function في Power Query، متى تصبح مفيدة أكثر من UI-based?
options: عندما تحتاج منطق معقد، parameters متعددة، أو إعادة استخدام متكررة
quizzes.explanation: Custom functions = مرونة. استخدمها للعمليات المتكررة المعقدة.
quizzes.en_question: When writing a custom function in Power Query, when does it become more useful than UI-based?
en_options: When you need complex logic, multiple parameters, or frequent reuse
quizzes.en_explanation: Custom functions = flexibility. Use it for complex repetitive operations.

quizzes.question: في star schema ب 1 fact و 5 dimensions، ما الحد الأقصى للصفوف في fact قبل تقسيم؟
options: 100 مليون (حسب RAM + network. فوق ذلك = تقسيم temporal أو خياري)
quizzes.explanation: Performance يعتمد على hardware. 100M+ = consider partitioning أو incremental.
quizzes.en_question: In a star schema with 1 fact and 5 dimensions, what is the maximum number of rows in fact before partitioning?
en_options: 100 million (by RAM + network. Above that = temporal partition or optional)
quizzes.en_explanation: Performance depends on hardware. 100M+ = consider partitioning or incremental.

quizzes.question: عند وجود عدة possible relationship paths بين جداول، ما المشكلة المحتملة؟
options: Ambiguous relationships (Power BI يختار واحد arbitrarily). الحل: نشط واحد، باقي بـ USERELATIONSHIP()
quizzes.explanation: Multiple paths = ambiguity. Power BI ينشط واحد. استخدم USERELATIONSHIP لـ override.
quizzes.en_question: When there are multiple possible relationship paths between tables, what is the potential problem?
en_options: Ambiguous relationships (Power BI chooses one arbitrarily). Solution: one active, remaining with USERELATIONSHIP()
The first option is always correct
quizzes.en_explanation: Multiple paths = ambiguity. Power BI activates one. Use USERELATIONSHIP to override.

quizzes.question: عند اختيار بين المقاييس (Measures)، ما السيناريو الوحيد لـ Calculated Column؟
options: عندما تحتاج عمود يُستخدم في سياق صفوف محدد (مثل: category الفئة)
quizzes.explanation: Calculated Column = derivation per row. Measure = aggregate. اختر حسب السياق.
quizzes.en_question: When choosing between Measures, what is the only scenario for Calculated Column?
en_options: When you need a column that is used in a specific row context (eg: category)
quizzes.en_explanation: Calculated Column = derivation per row. Measure = aggregate. Choose according to context.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام CALCULATE مع ALL()، ما الفرق عن CALCULATE بدون ALL()?
options: CALCULATE( Measure , ALL()) = احسب Measure بدون أي filters (الإجمالي العام)
quizzes.explanation: ALL = reset context. مفيد لـ '%of Grand Total' أو مقارنات عامة.
quizzes.en_question: When using CALCULATE with ALL(), what is the difference from CALCULATE without ALL()?
en_options: CALCULATE( Measure , ALL()) = Calculate Measure without any filters (general total)
quizzes.en_explanation: ALL = reset context. Useful for '%of Grand Total' or general comparisons.

quizzes.question: عند اختيار SUMPRODUCT vs SUMX لعمل معقد، أي مؤشر يرشدك؟
options: SUMX = Row Context clearer. SUMPRODUCT = matrix operations. اختر حسب logic clarity
quizzes.explanation: SUMX = readable للـ iterative logic. SUMPRODUCT = powerful لـ matrices. اختر clarity.
quizzes.en_question: When choosing SUMPRODUCT vs SUMX for complex work, which indicator guides you?
en_options: SUMX = Row Context clearer. SUMPRODUCT = matrix operations. Choose according to logic clarity
quizzes.en_explanation: SUMX = readable for iterative logic. SUMPRODUCT = powerful for matrices. Choose clarity.

quizzes.question: عند عرض 'Market Share' في dashboard، أي visual أنسب + visualization practice?
options: Pie/Donut للبيانات القليلة (3-5)، Stacked Bar للكثير (6+) أو مقارنات زمنية
quizzes.explanation: Pie = part-to-whole بسيط. Stacked Bar = flexible و comparable. اختر حسب البيانات.
quizzes.en_question: When displaying 'Market Share' in the dashboard, which visual is the most appropriate + visualization practice?
en_options: Pie/Donut for few data (3-5), Stacked Bar for many (6+) or time comparisons
quizzes.en_explanation: Pie = part-to-whole simple. Stacked Bar = flexible and comparable. Choose by data.

quizzes.question: عند تصميم Theme JSON، أي عنصر يؤثر على أداء الرسوم البيانية؟
options: عددكبير من colors/fonts المخصصة قد يؤدي لـ font loading delays (استخدم standard fonts)
quizzes.explanation: Performance = اختر fonts مدعومة (Cairo, Segoe) بدل Google Fonts غير الضرورية.
quizzes.en_question: When designing Theme JSON, which element affects the performance of visualizations?
en_options: A large number of custom colors/fonts may result in font loading delays (use standard fonts)
quizzes.en_explanation: Performance = Choose supported fonts (Cairo, Segoe) instead of unnecessary Google Fonts.

quizzes.question: عند مزامنة slicer عبر 4 صفحات مع data sources مختلفة، هل يعمل؟
quizzes.explanation: نعم، Sync Slicers يعمل حتى مع مصادر مختلفة طالما اسم العمود متطابق.
quizzes.en_question: When synchronizing a slicer across 4 pages with different data sources, does it work?
quizzes.en_explanation: Yes, Sync Slicers even works with different sources as long as the column name is identical.

quizzes.question: عند تطبيق RLS على Manager role (يرى بيانات فريقه فقط)، كيف تختبر قبل النشر؟
options: استخدم 'View as' في Power BI Service + test مع معرف Manager فعلي
quizzes.explanation: 'View as' = simulate different users. Test كل role قبل النشر الفعلي.
quizzes.en_question: When applying RLS to Manager role (sees only their team's data), how do you test before publishing?
en_options: Use 'View as' in Power BI Service + test with an actual Manager ID
quizzes.en_explanation: 'View as' = simulate different users. Test each role before actual deployment.

quizzes.question: عند نشر dataset به 1GB من البيانات، ما حد الأقصى للـ Shared Capacity؟
options: Shared Capacity محدودة (10GB total للـ workspace عموماً). 1GB = ممكن لكن اقترب من الحد
quizzes.explanation: Shared Capacity = مشترك. 1GB × عدة datasets = غالقة الحد. Premium أفضل للـ large datasets.
quizzes.en_question: When publishing a dataset with 1GB of data, what is the limit for Shared Capacity?
en_options: Shared Capacity is limited (10GB total for workspace in general). 1GB = possible, but close to the limit
quizzes.en_explanation: Shared Capacity = Shared. 1GB x multiple datasets = opaque limit. Premium is better for large datasets.

quizzes.question: عند إنشاء workspace جديد، متى تختار Premium Capacity بدل Shared؟
options: عندما يكون dataset > 100MB ، أو تحتاج Incremental Refresh ، أو user base كبير
quizzes.explanation: Premium = استثمار. Justified لـ high-volume أو features restricted (Incremental, etc).
quizzes.en_question: When creating a new workspace, when do you choose Premium Capacity instead of Shared?
en_options: When dataset > 100MB, or you need Incremental Refresh, or a large user base
quizzes.en_explanation: Premium = investment. Justified for high-volume or restricted features (Incremental, etc).

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Gateway، ما الفحص الأول إذا كان Refresh يفشل؟
options: Gateway status في Power BI + logs في الـ gateway machine نفسها + network connectivity
quizzes.explanation: Gateway failures = تشخيص منظم: Status + Logs + Network. بدون حدس.
quizzes.en_question: When using Gateway, what is the first check if Refresh fails?
en_options: Gateway status in Power BI + logs in the gateway machine itself + network connectivity
quizzes.en_explanation: Gateway failures = structured diagnostics: Status + Logs + Network. Without intuition.

quizzes.question: عند setup Incremental Refresh على dataset بـ 5 سنوات تاريخ، ما استراتيجية التقسيم الأمثل؟
options: مثال: تاريخ 3 سنوات قديم (بدون refresh) + 7 أيام rolling (يومي refresh)
quizzes.explanation: Incremental strategy = balance. تاريخ ثابت + rolling recent = أداء أفضل.
quizzes.en_question: When setting up Incremental Refresh on a dataset with 5 years of history, what is the optimal partitioning strategy?
en_options: Example: 3 years old date (no refresh) + 7 days rolling (daily refresh)
quizzes.en_explanation: Incremental strategy = balance. Fixed date + rolling recent = better performance.

quizzes.question: عند profiling تقرير بطيء في DAX Studio، أي من الآتي أكثر أهمية؟
options: Server Timings (execution time) + Cache hit rate + Storage size
quizzes.explanation: DAX profiling = timing metrics. Server time high = query optimization needed. Cache low = data pressure.
quizzes.en_question: When profiling a slow report in DAX Studio, which of the following is more important?
en_options: Server Timings (execution time) + Cache hit rate + Storage size
quizzes.en_explanation: DAX profiling = timing metrics. Server time high = query optimization needed. Cache low = data pressure.

quizzes.question: عند ظهور خطأ 'Timeout' في Query، ما السبب الأساسي غالباً؟
options: Database بطيء جداً (query expensive) أو network latency high أو data كبيرة جداً
quizzes.explanation: Timeout = query مكلفة أو infrastructure slow. Optimize query أو زيادة timeout value.
quizzes.en_question: When a 'Timeout' error appears in a Query, what is usually the main reason?
en_options: Database is too slow (query expensive), network latency is high, or data is too large
quizzes.en_explanation: Timeout = query expensive or infrastructure slow. Optimize query or increase timeout value.

quizzes.question: عند قرار Premium vs Shared + increase Refresh frequency، ما السؤال المالي الأساسي؟
options: مجموع التكلفة = Premium cost vs Shared × frequency impact على performance/support
quizzes.explanation: ROI decision = Business value vs cost. Premium cost للـ reliability + performance.
quizzes.en_question: When deciding between Premium vs Shared + increased Refresh frequency, what is the basic financial question?
en_options: Total cost = Premium cost vs Shared × frequency impact on performance/support
quizzes.en_explanation: ROI decision = Business value vs cost. Premium cost for reliability + performance.

quizzes.question: عند اختيار Paginated Reports بدل Power BI Reports، ما السيناريو الوحيد حقيقي؟
options: تقرير قانوني/مالي يحتاج تنسيق pixel-perfect + pages متكررة دقيقة
quizzes.explanation: Paginated = compliance + printing. Power BI = interactivity. اختر mission.
quizzes.en_question: When choosing Paginated Reports instead of Power BI Reports, what is the only real scenario?
en_options: Legal/financial report requires pixel-perfect format + accurate repetitive pages
quizzes.en_explanation: Paginated = compliance + printing. Power BI = interactivity. Choose mission.

quizzes.question: عند استخدام Deployment Pipeline مع 3 stages (Dev, Test, Prod)، ما الـ best practice؟
options: Code review → UAT → Production. لا تقفز المراحل حتى لـ hotfixes.
quizzes.explanation: Pipeline = governance. كل مرحلة = quality gate. Shortcuts = problems later.
quizzes.en_question: When using Deployment Pipeline with 3 stages (Dev, Test, Prod), what is the best practice?
en_options: Code review → UAT → Production. Don't jump stages even for hotfixes.
quizzes.en_explanation: Pipeline = governance. Each stage = quality gate. Shortcuts = problems later.

quizzes.question: عند مراجعة portfolio power BI لشركة، أي عنصر أكثر أهمية من الرسوم الجميلة؟
options: Business impact واضح (كم أثر على decisions/savings) + Data integrity + Governance
quizzes.explanation: Portfolio evaluation = impact. Beautiful visualizations بدون value = فشل. Impact = success.
quizzes.en_question: When reviewing a company's Power BI portfolio, which element is more important than pretty charts?
en_options: Business impact is clear (how much it affected decisions/savings) + Data integrity + Governance
quizzes.en_explanation: Portfolio evaluation = impact. Beautiful visualizations without value = failure. Impact = success.

quizzes.question: ما المشكلة الأساسية في علاقة Many-to-Many بدون Bridge Table؟
options: التكرار المزدوج — نفس المبيعات تُحسب أكثر من مرة بسبب حساب الأوزان في الاتجاهين
DAX لا يدعم أكثر من علاقة واحدة
البيانات لا تُحمَّل في الـ model
quizzes.explanation: M2M بدون Bridge = Double Counting. نفس الصف يُحسب مرتين لأن الفلتر يمشي في الاتجاهين، فتظهر أرقام أكبر من الحقيقة.
quizzes.en_question: What is the core problem with a Many-to-Many relationship without a Bridge Table?
en_options: Double counting — the same sales are counted more than once because weights are evaluated in both directions
DAX doesn't support more than one relationship
Data won't load into the model
quizzes.en_explanation: M2M without Bridge = Double Counting. The same row gets counted twice because the filter travels in both directions, producing numbers larger than reality.

quizzes.question: ما وظيفة TREATAS في DAX؟
options: ينشئ علاقة افتراضية داخل الـ Measure بدون تغيير الـ Data Model
يحذف علاقة موجودة في الـ model
quizzes.explanation: TREATAS = Virtual Relationship. يخبر DAX 'عامل هذا العمود كأنه قادم من جدول آخر' بدون إضافة أي علاقة فعلية في الـ model، مفيد في M2M والـ Budget.
quizzes.en_question: What does TREATAS do in DAX?
en_options: Creates a virtual relationship inside a Measure without changing the Data Model
Deletes an existing relationship in the model
quizzes.en_explanation: TREATAS = Virtual Relationship. It tells DAX 'treat this column as if it came from another table' without adding any real relationship in the model — useful for M2M and Budget patterns.

quizzes.question: في Bridge Table للـ Many-to-Many، ما علاقة الـ Bridge بالجداول الطرفين؟
options: Many-to-One من Bridge إلى كل من Fact و Dimension
quizzes.explanation: البريدج يُربط بـ Many-to-One مع كل طرف: Bridge → Product = Many-to-One، Bridge → Category = Many-to-One. هكذا يصبح هو الوسيط الذي يحل التعدد.
quizzes.en_question: In a Bridge Table for Many-to-Many, what relationship does the Bridge have with both side tables?
en_options: Many-to-One from Bridge to each of Fact and Dimension
quizzes.en_explanation: The bridge connects Many-to-One to each side: Bridge → Product = Many-to-One, Bridge → Category = Many-to-One. This makes it the intermediary that resolves the multiplicity.

quizzes.question: متى تستخدم TREATAS بدلاً من Bridge Table؟
options: عندما تريد حل M2M داخل Measure واحدة فقط بدون تعقيد الـ model
عندما يكون عندك أكثر من مليون صف في الـ Fact
TREATAS تحل محل Bridge في كل الحالات
quizzes.explanation: TREATAS = حل خفيف داخل DAX لحالة واحدة أو Measure محددة. Bridge Table = حل model-level يؤثر على كل الـ visuals. استخدم Bridge عندما تحتاج الـ M2M في كل مكان.
quizzes.en_question: When should you use TREATAS instead of a Bridge Table?
en_options: When you want to solve M2M inside a single Measure only without complicating the model
When you have more than a million rows in the Fact table
TREATAS replaces Bridge in all cases
quizzes.en_explanation: TREATAS = lightweight DAX fix for one specific Measure. Bridge Table = model-level fix that affects all visuals. Use Bridge when you need the M2M everywhere.

quizzes.question: ما مشكلة Granularity عند مقارنة المبيعات الفعلية بالميزانية؟
options: الـ Sales على مستوى يومي والـ Budget على مستوى شهري — لا يمكن ربطهما مباشرة
الـ Sales لا يحتوي على تواريخ
لا توجد مشكلة، Power BI يحلها تلقائياً
quizzes.explanation: Granularity Mismatch = مشكلة التفاصيل المختلفة. Sales = 1 صف لكل يوم/صفقة، Budget = 1 صف لكل شهر. لا يمكن JOIN مباشر — نحتاج TREATAS لنربطهما عبر YearMonth.
quizzes.en_question: What is the Granularity problem when comparing actual sales to budget?
en_options: Sales are at daily level while Budget is at monthly level — they can't be joined directly
No problem, Power BI handles it automatically
quizzes.en_explanation: Granularity Mismatch = different detail levels. Sales = 1 row per day/transaction, Budget = 1 row per month. Direct JOIN is impossible — TREATAS is needed to bridge them via YearMonth.

quizzes.question: في نموذج Budget vs Actual، لماذا ننشئ عمود YearMonth في جدول التواريخ؟
options: لربط الـ Fact_Budget (الشهري) بالـ Date Table عبر TREATAS لأن Budget يحتوي YearMonth وليس تاريخاً يومياً
Power BI يحتاجه للـ Time Intelligence
quizzes.explanation: YearMonth = مفتاح الوصل بين الجدولين. Date Table تحتوي يوم كامل، Budget تحتوي شهر فقط. TREATAS يقول 'عامل Dim_Date[YearMonth] كأنه نفس Fact_Budget[YearMonth]' فيتم التطابق صح.
quizzes.en_question: In a Budget vs Actual model, why do we create a YearMonth column in the Date Table?
en_options: To connect Fact_Budget (monthly) to the Date Table via TREATAS since Budget has YearMonth not a daily date
Just to display dates in a nice format
To calculate the difference between months
Power BI needs it for Time Intelligence
quizzes.en_explanation: YearMonth = the bridge key between the two tables. Date Table has full daily dates, Budget has only months. TREATAS says 'treat Dim_Date[YearMonth] as if it's Fact_Budget[YearMonth]' for correct matching.

quizzes.question: ما الصيغة الصحيحة لحساب Variance% (نسبة الانحراف) بين الفعلي والميزانية؟
quizzes.explanation: Variance% = (Actual - Budget) / Budget. نقسم على الـ Budget لأنه المرجع. نستخدم DIVIDE وليس / للحماية من القسمة على صفر عندما يكون Budget = 0.
quizzes.en_question: What is the correct formula to calculate Variance% (deviation percentage) between actual and budget?
quizzes.en_explanation: Variance% = (Actual - Budget) / Budget. We divide by Budget because it's the reference. We use DIVIDE not / to protect against division by zero when Budget = 0.

quizzes.question: لماذا يجب استخدام DATESYTD داخل CALCULATE عند حساب Budget YTD وليس TOTALYTD فقط؟
options: لأن TREATAS داخل الـ measure يحتاج CALCULATE لتطبيق الـ virtual relationship مع DATESYTD معاً
TOTALYTD لا يعمل مع أرقام الـ Budget
لا فرق بينهما في هذا السياق
quizzes.explanation: Budget YTD = CALCULATE([Total Budget], DATESYTD(Dim_Date[Date])). نستخدم CALCULATE لأن داخله الـ TREATAS يعمل بشكل صحيح مع تعديل السياق الزمني لـ DATESYTD.
quizzes.en_question: Why must you use DATESYTD inside CALCULATE when computing Budget YTD instead of just TOTALYTD?
en_options: Because TREATAS inside the measure needs CALCULATE to apply the virtual relationship together with DATESYTD
TOTALYTD doesn't work with Budget numbers
There is no difference in this context
quizzes.en_explanation: Budget YTD = CALCULATE([Total Budget], DATESYTD(Dim_Date[Date])). We use CALCULATE because TREATAS inside it works correctly alongside the DATESYTD time context modification.

quizzes.question: ما الفرق الرئيسي بين Storage Engine (SE) و Formula Engine (FE) في DAX؟
options: SE يعمل بالتوازي وسريع جداً، FE يعمل بخيط واحد وأبطأ — يجب تحميل أكبر قدر من الحساب على SE
SE أبطأ لكن أدق، FE أسرع لكن يقرّب النتائج
SE للعمليات الحسابية، FE لتخزين البيانات
لا فرق بينهما، هما نفس المحرك
quizzes.explanation: SE = Storage Engine: متوازي، مُحسَّن، يجلب البيانات. FE = Formula Engine: خيط واحد، يحسب التعابير المعقدة. القاعدة: كلما قلّ عمل FE، كلما كان الـ DAX أسرع.
quizzes.en_question: What is the main difference between Storage Engine (SE) and Formula Engine (FE) in DAX?
